summary: Copied the provided banner image into `assets/atlas-banner.png` and updated homepage banner styling in `assets/main.css` so the existing ATLAS title/date overlay renders on top of the image with responsive darkening and mobile-safe positioning.
work_completed: Copied `/Users/yashturkar/Downloads/Gemini_Generated_Image_jznpqxjznpqxjznp (1).png` to `assets/atlas-banner.png` as a stable repository asset.
Replaced the CSS-only banner panel with the new banner image background in `assets/main.css`.
Added layered overlay gradients and z-index handling so the ATLAS title and logistics text remain legible on top of the image.
Added a narrow-screen banner adjustment so the image crops more cleanly and the bottom-right text reflows to the left on smaller viewports.

findings.message: No automated tests were added or run; verification for this task is limited to asset presence and CSS integration.
Documentation impact appears minimal because the site remains a single-page static site with unchanged information architecture.

follow_up_recommendations: Perform a quick browser pass on desktop and mobile widths to confirm the chosen crop and overlay strength against the final hosted rendering.
